privileged_info_summary: The task involves editing metadata for Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District, a real landmark 1969 US Supreme Court case. All verified privileged information: (1) The case was decided on February 24, 1969 by the United States Supreme Court; (2) The case docket number is No. 21 (metadata states 'Docket No. 21'); (3) The case is reported at 393 U.S. 503; (4) The full case name is 'Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District' (metadata simplifies to 'Tinker'). The data represents real historical legal information, not synthetic cases.
